heading: Connection String
body:
To run queries, you must first connect to your Online Archive. Your
[Connect to MongoDB Search Community](manual/core/search-in-community/connect-to-search) allows you to only
query data in your Atlas cluster. To query your Online Archive,
you must use one of the following:

- [Connect to Online Archive and Cluster](connect-online-archive-cluster-atlas-ui) - this read-only
  connection string allows you to read data directly from the live
  cluster. This impacts available resources for IOPS (Input/Output Operations per Second), and from your
  Online Archive.

- [Connect to Online Archive](connect-online-archive-atlas-ui) - this read-only
  connection string allows you to read data from the Online Archive
  only and doesn't affect cluster resources.
